title: Trump Wanted a U.S. Soccer Star to Play in the World Cup. FIFA Found a Way.
summary_full: There was nothing unusual about a call from President Trump or the reversal of Folarin Balogun’s suspension, said the president of FIFA, Gianni Infantino.
summary_public: There was nothing unusual about a call from President Trump or the reversal of Folarin Balogun’s suspension, said the president of FIFA, Gianni Infantino.
